title: Ghastling Fireballs
description: Ever wanted to shoot fireballs with your ghastlings? No? Well you can do it now.
body:
### Ever wanted to shoot fireballs with your ghastlings? No? Well you can do it now.
>Just press X! You might have to change your keybinds tho.

I don't know why i made this, but i've wanted to make it since they showed it in the minecraft live.

Yes, happy ghasts eat snowballs and shouldn't shoot fire balls, but i still found it to be a funny concept.
